sentences.arabic: تَحْتَلُّ رِيَاضَةُ الْفُرُوسِيَّةِ مَكَانَةً خَاصَّةً فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، وَتَرْتَبِطُ ارْتِبَاطًا وَثِيقًا بِمَنْظُومَةِ قِيَمِ الشَّجَاعَةِ وَالشَّهَامَةِ وَالشَّرَفِ.
sentences.translation: Jahanje konja zauzima posebno mjesto u arapskoj kulturi i usko je povezano s vrijednosnim sustavom hrabrosti, plemenitosti i časti.
sentences.translationEn: Horsemanship holds a special place in Arab culture, closely tied to the value system of courage, nobility, and honour.

sentences.arabic: تَعْكِسُ قَصَائِدُ الْفَرَسِ فِي الشِّعْرِ الْعَرَبِيِّ الْقَدِيمِ مَدَى الرَّابِطَةِ الِاسْتِثْنَائِيَّةِ الَّتِي كَانَتْ تَجْمَعُ الْفَارِسَ بِجَوَادِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesme o konju u staroj arapskoj poeziji odražavaju iznimnu vezu koja je spajala jahača s njegovim konjem.
sentences.translationEn: Poems about the horse in classical Arabic poetry reflect the exceptional bond that united the rider with his steed.

sentences.arabic: وَمَا زَالَتِ الْمَهْرَجَانَاتُ الَّتِي تُقَامُ لِعُرُوضِ الْخَيْلِ فِي دُوَلِ الْخَلِيجِ تَسْتَقْطِبُ جُمُوعًا غَفِيرَةً مِنَ الْمُعْجَبِينَ وَالْهُوَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Festivali posvećeni konjskim nastupima u državama Zaljeva i dalje privlače ogromne mase obožavatelja i zaljubljenika.
sentences.translationEn: Festivals dedicated to equestrian displays in the Gulf states still attract large crowds of admirers and enthusiasts.

sentences.arabic: وَتُوَثِّقُ سِجِلَّاتُ النَّسَبِ الْخَاصَّةُ بِالْخَيْلِ الْعَرَبِيِّ الْأَصِيلِ تَارِيخًا مُمْتَدًّا لِأَلْفِ سَنَةٍ مِنَ الِاهْتِمَامِ وَالرِّعَايَةِ وَالتَّنَافُسِ.
sentences.translation: Rodovske matice arapskog čistokrvnog konja dokumentiraju historiju dugu hiljadu godina puna brige, uzgoja i takmičenja.
sentences.translationEn: The genealogical records of the purebred Arabian horse document a history spanning a thousand years of care, breeding, and competition.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَوَّلُ هَذَا الْإِرْثُ الْيَوْمَ إِلَى صِنَاعَةٍ اقْتِصَادِيَّةٍ مُتَنَامِيَةٍ تَشْمَلُ سِبَاقَاتِ الْخَيْلِ الدَّوْلِيَّةَ وَتِجَارَةَ الْأَحْصِنَةِ بِمَلَايِينَ الدَّوْلَارَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ova baština danas se pretvara u rastuću ekonomsku industriju koja obuhvaća međunarodne utrke konja i trgovinu konjima vrijednu milijune dolara.
sentences.translationEn: This heritage is today transforming into a growing economic industry encompassing international horse racing and horse trading worth millions of dollars.
